# Ezoic Brand Guidelines — Full Guide

Brand standards / Vol. 02 — 2026 / Light edition · experimental v0.1
Canonical surface: https://iheartezoic.com · This document is the complete machine-readable edition of the guide, optimized for one use case: creating Ezoic marketing and collateral with perfect brand style. One fetch gives you the standards, the tokens, the component recipes, the per-material playbooks, the full asset catalog, and the pre-ship checklist.

## How To Use This Guide (API + MCP)

Endpoints:

- GET https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand — full structured JSON (sections: intro, logo, variants, color, type, elements, voice, tokens, components, playbooks, case-study, style, checklist, access, footer)
- GET https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/sections/{id} — one section
- GET https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/search?q= — keyword search
- GET https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/assets?root=brand|design-elements|photo-backs|fonts|all — live asset records (path, URL, MIME, bytes, dimensions, status)
- GET https://iheartezoic.com/api/ezoic-brand/assets/grouped · /assets/download?root=... — grouped counts · ZIP
- MCP server at https://iheartezoic.com/api/mcp — tools: read_brand_guide(section?, format?) · search_brand_standards(query, limit?) · list_brand_assets(root?, query?) · get_brand_asset(publicPath)

The creation workflow:

1. Load the standards — read_brand_guide(section='style') or GET /api/ezoic-brand. Cache for the session.
2. Resolve real assets — list_brand_assets(root='brand') / GET /assets. Never infer what a file shows from its name; place only files with status master or current.
3. Pick the playbook for the material type (below) and compose from the tokens and component recipes.
4. Place master files for every logo/wordmark occurrence — one of the four pairings, clear space = emblem height. The wordmark is never typeset.
5. Run the pre-ship checklist (bottom of this document). Leave metric/quote/customer slots open unless a cited value exists.

## Intro — Growth Engineering.

Ezoic's identity is light, editorial, and type-led. This guide is the source of truth for how the brand looks. Every mark in it is a master file — place the files as supplied; never re-draw, re-color, or re-type them.

Positioning: Ezoic is revenue infrastructure for the modern web — the operating layer for independent web businesses. Tagline: "Revenue infrastructure for the modern web."

## Logo

- Primary lockup — emblem left, wordmark right. File: /brand/lockup-dark.png (light surfaces).
- Reversed — ink surfaces only. File: /brand/lockup-light.png.
- The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.
- Clear space: the emblem height, labelled x, on every side. Never shrink below legibility; never on busy imagery without an approved veil.

## Logo On Color

Four pairings, then leave it alone:

1. Core on cloud — default (/brand/lockup-dark.png on #E3E3E3 or a white panel).
2. Steel on cloud — quiet (steel-on-cloud master; see catalog).
3. Reversed on ink (/brand/lockup-light.png on #252726).
4. Steel on ink — quiet reverse (steel-on-ink master; see catalog).

## Logo Usage — Use The Master Files.

Do:
- Place the supplied files as-is — the mark is never re-typeset, re-drawn, or approximated.
- Keep clear space equal to the emblem height — labelled x — on every side.
- Sit the mark on quiet surfaces, at full opacity, in one of the four approved pairings.

Don't:
- Never recolor outside the palette, stretch, rotate, or add shadows.
- Never place the mark on busy imagery without an approved veil, or shrink it below legibility.

Emblem finishes: Green #70A92A · Ink #252726 · Steel #969696 · On ink, the green holds. The one safe-to-recreate-in-code asset is the standalone emblem as inline SVG using the exact vector path from /brand/emblem-white.svg, recolored only within these finishes.

## Color — Neutrals Build. Green Points.

| Name | Hex | Role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ezoic Green | #70A92A | The single accent — the mark, primary actions, signature moments. It earns every appearance |
| Charcoal | #252726 | Primary text; ink surfaces |
| Graphite | #575757 | Secondary text, metadata, captions |
| Steel | #969696 | Muted: quiet pairings, borders, page numbers, secondary text on ink |
| Cloud | #E3E3E3 | The page surface |

Discipline: surfaces are cloud or ink. Don't introduce new brand hues for surfaces, charts, or components — neutrals build the page; green makes the point. The previous mint-led dark system is retired. Light, always.

Dark mode is eliminated. There is no dark mode or dark theme — this is a decision, not a pending question. Ink surfaces (reversed-logo panels, full-bleed bands, the back cover) are local accents inside the light system, never a global theme. Do not build a .dark variant.

Accent budget: in any single composition, green appears in one or two places — the mark, and at most one primary action or one signature proof moment. If green is everywhere, it points at nothing.

Notes: white #FFFFFF and alpha/color-mix derivatives of the five declared values are permitted only as quiet surface tints (raised panels, washes) — never as new hues. Green measures 2.8:1 on light surfaces and is never small text on cloud/white; body text is Charcoal on Cloud (11.5:1), secondary Graphite on Cloud (5.9:1). No brand gradient exists.

## Font — Inter

- Headings — Inter Display (28pt optical): letter spacing −5% · line spacing 125% · Title Case, closed with a period · weights 900 / 700 / 600.
- Body — Inter Text (18pt optical): letter spacing −3% · line spacing 150% · sentence case · weight 400.
- Reddit Mono — code, file paths, hex & exact values. Never decoration. Medium weight in use (variable 200–900).

## Type In Use — One Family. Two Optical Sizes.

Scale: Display 900 Black (headlines) · Display 700 Bold (titles) · Display 600 SemiBold (headings) · Text 400 Regular (body) · Mono Medium (exact values: EPMV · ezID · JS snippet · #70A92A).

- Nothing is set in all caps. Hierarchy comes from scale and spacing — not caps, not bold runs.
- The wordmark is never typeset. It is a file, placed.
- Oversized display specimens mirroring the guide's own pages may sit tighter than the 125% heading standard; 125% remains the standard in running layouts.

## The Pixel Wash — Decisive, Concise, Clear.

The system's one texture. Neutrals only, one wash per surface, always under the content:

- Editorial collage — hero surfaces · 14% (overlay-hero; PNG master Frame 120911).
- Wash 01 — ink bands · 8% (overlay-01).
- Wash 02 — ink bands · 10% (overlay-02).
- Cover wash — light ghost-emblem washes for full-bleed light sheets (Frame 120903; alternate Frame 120904).

A wash never carries color, never crowds the mark, and never substitutes for hierarchy. Photography inside a wash is light-washed and sits quiet under the system; when no approved image exists, use a quiet editorial surface with an open media slot.

## Voice — Direct. Confident. Technical.

1. Direct — say what you mean. Cut the fog. If a claim is weak, sharpen it or drop it.
2. Confident — state verified things plainly. Confidence is about truth, not volume.
3. Technical — Ezoic is revenue infrastructure for the modern web — never a generic vendor, ad network, or plugin.

Terminology:

| Term | Set as | Note |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ezoic | Ezoic | Never EZOIC or lowercase ezoic outside logo and domain contexts |
| ezID | ezID | Lowercase ez, capital ID — the identity sub-brand |
| EPMV | EPMV | All caps. Expand to "Earnings Per Thousand Visitors" on first use |
| JS snippet | JS snippet | Preferred wording for the lightweight integration |
| Open.Video | Open.Video | The period is part of the name |

Copy guardrails: data-led, not adjective-led — adjectives support numbers, never replace them. The customer is the subject of most sentences. Category framing is revenue infrastructure / operating layer — never ad network, plugin, or tool. Avoid hype vocabulary (revolutionary, game-changing, best-in-class, cutting-edge, next-generation, unleash, supercharge, elevate) and any sentence that could appear on any other ad-tech site. Refocus, never attack.

## Design Tokens (copy-paste)

```css
--green: #70A92A;    --ink: #252726;      --graphite: #575757;
--steel: #969696;    --cloud: #E3E3E3;    --panel: #FFFFFF;
--hair: rgb(37 39 38 / 0.13);   --hair-ink: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12);
--tracking-heading: -0.05em;    --tracking-body: -0.03em;
--leading-heading: 1.25;        --leading-body: 1.5;
--r-panel: 16px;  --r-band: 24px;  --r-pill: 999px;
--maxw: 1320px;   --gut: clamp(20px, 5vw, 64px);
--ease: cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1);
--wash-collage: 0.14;  --wash-01: 0.08;  --wash-02: 0.10;
```

Font stacks: display 'Inter Display','Inter Text',sans-serif · text 'Inter Text',sans-serif · mono 'Reddit Mono',monospace. Files self-hosted at /fonts (see catalog). Charts: one highlighted series in green; everything else charcoal/graphite/steel — never a default library palette. The full Tailwind v4 + shadcn theme layer ships in the repo at brand-site/design-system/.

## Component Recipes

- Primary action: green pill — 999px radius, #70A92A fill, white text, weight 600–700; hover shifts to ink. One per composition.
- Secondary action on ink: ghost pill — 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12) border, cloud text.
- Text link: ink text, 1px ink underline; hover extends or recolors the underline to green.
- Tag: small hairline pill, sentence case, graphite text ("experimental · v0.1" is the model).
- Panel: white raised panel, 16px radius, hairline border. Bands: 24px radius. Never stock rounded-md SaaS chrome, never heavy drop shadows.
- Ink band: local #252726 band; reversed or steel-on-ink lockup only; optional single wash at 8–10% under content.
- Ruled rows: hairline-divided rows (no boxes) — label left in small graphite/steel, content right. The guide's TOC, terminology table, and type scale are the models.
- Sheet chrome (document collateral): running head top-left (13px, 600), emblem top-right (green, ~30px), hairline footer — label left, mono page number right.
- Proof slot: a green-led signature moment (band or oversized numeral) whose value area stays empty until a cited value exists.
- Clear-space diagram: lockup inside a dashed green boundary with mono x labels.
- Motion: quiet entrance (opacity + slight rise, ~0.7s, the brand ease); minimal hover. Nothing bounces, nothing spins.

## Playbooks — Per Material Type

All playbooks inherit: cloud or ink surfaces · one dominant idea per section · master files for every mark · mono only for exact values · claim slots open until cited · checklist before shipping.

- Landing page: hero (one Title-Case-with-period headline, optional collage wash at 14%, one green pill) → ruled proof/feature rows → a single ink band as the one dark accent → quiet footer with the reversed lockup. Avoid: SaaS card grids, multiple washes, gradients.
- Deck slide: title 5–7 words (Display 700) → 1–2 sentence claim → 2–3 numeric proof points in a ruled row → lockup small in a corner. Headline stat as hero typography (Display 900, ink on cloud; green only for the signature stat). Cloud slides by default; at most one ink accent slide per deck section. Avoid: small-to-big funnels, full-sentence bullets, stock AI-hype graphics, all-caps labels.
- Social image: one idea — oversized Display type on cloud, or the campaign frame (one green band + one mark over light-washed photography). One mark only; respect clear space at small sizes.
- One-pager: sheet chrome → headline → ruled rows for the argument → proof slot → one CTA line. Avoid two-column density, boxed callouts, decorative mono.
- Case study: situation → operating change → green-led proof slot (cited values only) → quote slot (open until sourced) → next action. Light-washed photography or a quiet surface with an open media slot.
- Email: wordmark file small at top (never typeset) → one headline → short body at 150% → one green pill CTA → quiet footer. White/cloud only; no ink bands or washes in email.
- Ad creative: the campaign frame — one green band, one mark, light-washed people; or type-only on cloud with the emblem holding the frame. No gradients, no unsourced claims.

## Applied Examples (Deferred)

The draft example frames are pending re-audit — their treatments defy the v0.1 guide (old-lime band, dark treatments) and were removed from the live guide. Do not place or treat them as models until re-approved. The standing principles remain: the mark holds the frame; one green band, one mark; people light-washed — imagery sits quiet under the system.

## Layout And Surfaces

- Max content width 1320px; gutter clamp(20px, 5vw, 64px).
- Sheet rhythm: running head top-left, emblem top-right, hairline footer with mono page number.
- Rounded surfaces: 16px panels/tiles/swatches, 24px large bands, 999px pills.
- Hairlines: rgb(37 39 38 / 0.13) on light; rgb(255 255 255 / 0.12) on ink.

## Asset Catalog

Status key: master = v0.1 master, place as supplied · current = approved, place where its role fits · draft = reference only, never ship · duplicate = use the master path · retired = never place.

ALIGNED: the live catalog at iheartezoic.com serves the v0.1 set (deployed 2026-07-04; 88 records — RedditMono-VF.woff2, the steel pairing masters at /brand/lockup-steel-cloud.png and /brand/lockup-steel-ink.png, and the pixel-wash assets are live) and is the authoritative source. This repo mirrors the masters for offline reference. Prior-system design-elements/photo-backs remain pending re-audit. Export files the guide references but no source yet carries (UPDATE/coreLogo.png, UPDATE/Frame 120913.png, the In The Wild collages) ship from the brand owner's v0.1 export pack.

| File | Status | Role | Size |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| brand/lockup-dark.png | master | Core lockup — emblem left, wordmark right (light surfaces) | 763×167 |
| brand/lockup-light.png | master | Reversed lockup — ink surfaces only | 763×167 |
| brand/truth-assets/UPDATE/Frame 120889.png | master | Steel-on-cloud pairing (quiet) | 1227×261 |
| brand/truth-assets/UPDATE/Frame 120891.png | master | Steel-on-ink pairing (quiet reverse) | 1227×261 |
| brand/emblem-white.svg | master | Emblem vector master — safe to recreate inline, palette finishes only | vector |
| brand/emblem-green.png | current | Emblem — green finish | 128×127 |
| brand/mark-muted.png | current | Emblem — steel finish | 110×110 |
| brand/wordmark-dark.png · wordmark-light.png | current | Wordmark files — never typeset | 811×185 |
| brand/ezid-dark.png · ezid-light.png | current | ezID sub-brand lockups — only where that product is represented | 489×338 |
| brand/logo-alt-dark.png · logo-alt-light.png | current | Alternate compact lockups — verify before placing | ~447×102 |
| brand/UPDATE/Frame 120911.png | master | Editorial collage — PNG master of the hero wash (14%) | 2544×1344 |
| overlays/overlay-hero.png · overlay-01.png · overlay-02.png | current | Wash renders (14% / 8% / 10%). Note: JPEG data despite .png extension | — |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120903.png | master | Cover wash — light ghost-emblem | 6380×3664 |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120904.png | current | Alternate light ghost-emblem wash (large file — compress for web) | 6376×3664 |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120905.png | draft | Example frame — pending re-audit; do not place | 688×560 |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120906.png | draft | Example frame (campaign) — pending re-audit; do not place | 6376×3665 |
| brand/truth-assets/UPDATE/Union*.png | current | Emblem glyph cutouts — check each file's finish before placing | 485–852 |
| fonts/Inter_28pt-{Black,Bold,SemiBold}.woff2 | master | Inter Display 900/700/600 | — |
| fonts/Inter_18pt-{Light…Bold}.woff2 | master/current | Inter Text 300–700 (body is 400) | — |
| fonts/RedditMono-VF.woff2 | master | Reddit Mono variable — exact values only | — |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120889/120891/120892/120894.png | duplicate | Earlier/byte-identical exports — use the UPDATE/ masters | — |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120893.png · Frame 120857.png | draft | Lockup variants NOT among the four approved pairings — reference only | 1227×261 |
| brand/truth-assets/Frame 120894.png (UPDATE) · Frame 120899.png | draft | Draft brand/palette sheets — superseded values (105%/110%; #222423). The written spec wins | — |
| brand/emblem-mint.png · mark-mint.png · mark-lime.png · mark-frog.png | retired | Mint-era finishes — never place | — |

## Pre-Ship Checklist

1. Color audit: no hex/rgb outside #70A92A, #252726, #575757, #969696, #E3E3E3 plus white/alpha tints. No gradients.
2. Green budget: only the mark, one primary action, and/or one signature moment — never small text on light surfaces.
3. Caps audit: zero all-caps runs. Headings Title Case closed with a period; body sentence case.
4. Type spec: headings −5% / 125% Inter Display; body −3% / 150% Inter Text.
5. Mono audit: Reddit Mono only on code, file paths, hex, page numbers, exact values.
6. Logo audit: every mark is an approved file in one of the four pairings, full opacity, clear space ≥ emblem height; nothing recolored, stretched, rotated, or shadowed; the wordmark is a file.
7. Wash audit: max one wash per surface, neutrals only, under content, at approved opacity, never over the mark.
8. Surface audit: cloud or ink only; ink is a local accent; dark mode does not exist.
9. Integrity audit: every metric/quote/customer/partner cited or its slot visibly open; no filename-inferred meanings; no retired or draft assets placed.
10. Terminology audit: Ezoic · ezID · EPMV · JS snippet · Open.Video set exactly; category framing is revenue infrastructure / operating layer.

## Content Integrity / Source Notes

- Use the live asset catalog before placing logos, marks, design elements, photo backdrops, or font files.
- Use filenames as locators, not as proof of what an asset depicts or means.
- Leave claim slots empty or clearly open when a metric, customer name, partner name, quote, product fact, or outcome is not available.
- Do not invent metrics, customers, outcomes, screenshots, quotes, partners, product capabilities, or asset meanings.

Not specified in the current source set: logo min sizes, CMYK/Pantone, co-branding, iconography/illustration systems, print layout, motion/broadcast system, an approved destructive color, or a chart palette. (Dark mode is not an open question — it is eliminated.)

Conflict note: draft asset sheets carry superseded values (ink #222423; line spacing 105%/110%). The guide's written spec — ink #252726; 125%/150% — is the contract.

Copyright Ezoic 2026 — experimental draft, not ratified.
